category_sources: source_facts.description says Icon is a general-purpose programming language.
display_name_sources: source_facts.name identifies the project as icon; source_facts.homepage is the official University of Arizona Icon page.
docs_sources: source_facts.homepage is the official Icon programming language site and primary documentation surface.

tags_sources: source_facts.description identifies a general-purpose programming language; source_facts.executables lists icon, icont, and iconx.
